one_line: Wrote a candid, repo-grounded Limitations section (L1 synthetic incidents, L2 oracle circularity, L3 preliminary RFT v1 declined/v2 +0.037, L4 reward-hacking D13 hedge 92.9%, L5 single-domain + blocked Fireball, L6 statistical power) plus an evidence index and a stdlib citation-existence checker that exits 0.
